claim.notWhat: Not a full-vocabulary argmax, not a full layer-63 CSL run, and not hardware execution. The q4k lm-head row is dequantized host-side and each selected dense dot runs in CSL; strict logit tolerance status is recorded separately from the top-token decision bound.
claim.scope: Doppler supplies real Qwen 3.6 27B af16 post-FFN state for the final prompt position; CSL computes the q4k lm-head logits for the Doppler top-k token candidates across hidden chunks and preserves the top-token decision.
